hooks.command: if [ -x "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/bin/check-worktree" ]; then exec "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/bin/check-worktree"; else exec "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/check-worktree"; fi

[ "${CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE:-}" = true ] || exit 0 && if [ -x "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/bin/claude-code-web-setup" ]; then exec "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/bin/claude-code-web-setup"; else exec "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/claude-code-web-setup"; fi
command -v hk >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.hk.toml" ] && HK_PKL_BACKEND=pklr hk fix $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS || true
